title: Kids Photography Adventure
shortDesc: Give kids a camera and let them discover Samui through their own lens — a creative guided tour.
description: This unique guided photography tour puts a camera in your child's hands and lets them explore Koh Samui as junior photographers. Led by a friendly local guide, kids visit colourful temples, fishing villages, and jungle trails while learning basic photography tips — framing, light, and storytelling. At the end, the best shots are reviewed together. A creative, confidence-building activity that results in real keepsake photos.
